data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Implementation complete. Changes: (1) red-test-writer-output.md — added Format 3 (TEST_RESULT:no_new_tests_needed) with REASON enum (green_classified | existing_coverage_sufficient), EXISTING_TESTS optional field, evaluator bypass note, and two example outputs; updated Emitter section to describe three-way output; updated Parser section to note bypass; updated exit code table and failure contract. (2) red-test-evaluator-verdict.md — updated Relationship section to explicitly name both bypass cases (written + no_new_tests_needed); updated Parser section to state evaluator is only invoked on TEST_RESULT:rejected. ✓
